news.title: jcvkl
news.desc: Our inaugural training session brought together 20 enthusiastic players

news.title: First Training Session a Success
news.excerpt: First session kicks off with great energy and team drills.
news.desc: Our inaugural training session brought together 20 enthusiastic players
news.details: Great turnout and strong team chemistry. We ran technical drills, small-sided games, and fitness work. Several players stood out for leadership and promise. Coaching staff will provide individualized training plans next week with follow-up assessment. Refreshments and a team photo wrapped the day on a high note. The session lasted over two hours and included a closing talk from the head coach about discipline, nutrition, and upcoming priorities for the season. Everyone left motivated and already asking when the next practice is—this marks the launch of a new era for the team.

news.title: Trials Announced
news.excerpt: Open tryouts at Riverside Park, all ages welcome.
news.desc: Open trials for new players on April 1st. All ages welcome!
news.details: Join us at Riverside Park, 10 AM. Bring water, shoes, and enthusiasm. Registration is free.

players.bio: Experienced striker with 5 years in league.
